name: Beijing Fried Sauce Noodles
description: Authentic Beijing flavor, a century-old taste. Signature fried sauce noodles, chewy noodles, rich sauce aroma.

name: Italian Pizza House
description: Using imported flour and fresh ingredients, traditional wood-fire baking. Every bite is full of Italian flair.

name: Sweet Honey Dessert Shop
description: Healing desserts to make life a little sweeter. Fresh fruit, high-quality milk, carefully crafted.
